source_text: Acetohydrazide (3) Method 1 : Ethyl acetate (8.98 g, 102 mmol), hydrazine hydrate 98% (6.76 g, 135 mmol) was added dropwise, and the mixture was refluxed for 6 h. The precipitate was filtered off, washed with hexane and recrystallized from ethanol to give white hygroscopic crystalline 3 (7.01 g, 93%); mp: 58 °C

Method 2 : Acetic acid (4 g, 60 mmol) was refluxed with hydrazine hydrate 80% (3.33 g, 60 mmol) in 10 ml of absolute ethanol for 5 h. The solid obtained was filtered off, washed with cold water, recrystallized from ethanol to give white crystals 3 ( 3.15 g, 64%); mp. 60 °C
